message:
refactor(widgets): TextInput word navigation and validation ergonomics

TextInput improvements:
- Convert scroll_cells from usize to Cell<usize> for interior mutability
- Extract get_grapheme_class() as static method to eliminate closure duplication
- Refactor move_cursor_word_left/right to use iterator-based traversal
  instead of collecting all graphemes into Vec, reducing allocations
- Word movement now operates directly on byte slices with grapheme iteration

ValidationErrorDisplay refinements:
- Replace with_alpha() calls with explicit PackedRgba::rgba() construction
  for opacity application (clearer intent, avoids trait lookup ambiguity)
- Update test assertions to use Widget::render() explicitly instead of
  method syntax for disambiguation
- Use let-chains in ellipsis detection loop (Rust 2024 edition feature)

VirtualizedListState:
- Use fully-qualified Stateful trait path to avoid unused import warning
- Consistent with other widget implementations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
